excerpt: …restricted access and requires protective gear to be worn at all times: tyvek suit covering head and feet, gloves, hairnet, facemask. All persons entering this lab have their DNA profiled and kept for future comparison. Sample Preparation All aDNA samples are rinsed in ethanol and allowed to dry. Each specimen is separately milled and dissolved into extraction buffer DNA Extraction TNE Extraction [Hansen et al, 1974]: Sample 1 to 5 Extraction buffer is made…
